objections.objection_text: I already know all the Bible verses and truths, but they don't seem to work.
objections.underlying_fear: That God has abandoned me or that I am beyond repair despite my knowledge.
objections.counter_truth_angle: Knowledge is the map; faith is the walking. You can't just know the mask exists; you have to put it on.
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: I know all the Bible verses. I know. Oh, he's not left me in that he never will. But why do I feel so far away from him?

objections.objection_text: I can't afford it; it would put a bind on everything.
objections.underlying_belief: Financial scarcity is a valid reason to delay spiritual survival.
objections.underlying_fear: Losing control of my last remaining security (money) while everything else is in chaos.
objections.counter_truth_angle: Is it more expensive to invest in your soul, or to continue paying the price of total burnout and broken family dynamics?
objections.transcript_proof_quote_redacted: It would put a bind on everything. ... It's hard for me to stand up for myself.
